summary: Iteration 66: Validated service worker implementation for static asset caching. SW registered successfully. All page navigation tests passed. No 429 errors detected. Desktop and mobile homepage load with correct dark theme styling. Mobile tab bar functional at bottom of viewport.

service_worker.GET /sw.js: PASS - Returns 200 with content-type: application/javascript; charset=UTF-8
service_worker.registration: PASS - Service worker registers on homepage load (count: 1)
service_worker.caching_patterns: Verified in code: /_next/static/, /_next/image, .woff2, .woff, .css cached; /api/, /_next/data/, analytics never cached

critical_regression.desktop_homepage_1920x800: PASS - Loads with dark theme, hero visible, LEXA branding correct
critical_regression.mobile_homepage_390x844: PASS - Loads immediately after desktop, no unstyled flash

page_navigation./solutions: PASS - Hero with 'INTEGRATED SYSTEMS' visible, solutions list loaded
page_navigation./project-builder: PASS - Dark Luxury theme, SMART PROJECT BUILDER hero visible
page_navigation./about: PASS - Center-aligned hero with stats (1,000+ Projects, 20+ Years, 32+ Brand Partners, 4.9/5 Rating)

admin_regression.login: PASS - admin/lexa2026 credentials work, redirects to /admin/dashboard
admin_regression.dashboard: PASS - Shows 106 Solutions, 20 Projects, 54 Articles, 37 Brands, 46 Consultations

mobile.tab_bar: PASS - Fixed bottom nav (66px height) with HOME, BUILDER, PROJECTS, SERVICES, CONTACT

critical_code_review_comments: Service worker implementation follows best practices: cache-first for immutable hashed assets, stale-while-revalidate for others
SW registration moved to ClientLayout.tsx useEffect - proper placement for activation on any page
Never-cache patterns correctly exclude API calls and analytics - prevents stale data issues
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service worker (sw.js) now caches static assets to prevent 429 rate limiting. Registration in ClientLayout.tsx. All pages load correctly. Admin dashboard shows live counts from CMS. Mobile tab bar works at bottom viewport.
